sectionSubtitle: My thoughts on AI, Machine Learning and Data Engineering.

post1.title: How I optimized a classification model by 40%
post1.excerpt: Lessons learned on the optimization techniques that helped me go from a 0.67 F1-score to 0.94 on a multi-class NLP classification problem.

post2.title: Designing a scalable data pipeline architecture
post2.excerpt: A practical guide to designing modern data architecture: from choosing between batch and streaming, to Airflow orchestration and monitoring.

post3.title: LLMs in production: lessons learned and pitfalls to avoid
post3.excerpt: After deploying 3 LLM-based systems, here are the lessons on prompt engineering, RAG, costs, and latency management.

post4.title: From notebook to production: industrializing an ML model
post4.excerpt: Jupyter notebooks are great for exploration. But how to transform a prototype into a reliable service? MLOps, CI/CD, and best practices.
